title: Fall Apart Tender French Chuck Roast Clafoutis
description: A savory and tender French dish featuring chuck roast, perfect for a date night, with a unique twist on the traditional clafoutis recipe, incorporating fry grind rice khao khuas and kosher friendly ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the chuck roast with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium high heat and sear the chuck roast until browned on all sides.
Add the onion, garlic, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the red wine and fry grind rice khao khuas to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 2 1/2 hours or until the meat is tender and falls apart easily.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the clafoutis hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
